summary: Completed comprehensive testing of NIRO V5 8-step onboarding flow and backend tier APIs. All 25 backend tests passed. Frontend V5 flow tested successfully through Splash -> Birth Details -> Topic Selection -> Sub-topic Selection -> Trust -> Pack Selection -> Checkout screens.
critical_code_review_comments: V5 flow is well-implemented with proper data-testid attributes for testing
All 18 sub-topics have correct tier pricing in backend catalog
Supported tier correctly marked as 'Recommended' across all sub-topics
context_for_next_testing_agent: V5 onboarding flow is fully functional. Test file /app/backend/tests/test_v5_tiers.py covers all 18 sub-topic tier APIs. Frontend screens tested: SplashScreenV5, BirthDetailsScreenV5, TopicSelectionScreen, SubtopicSelectionScreen, TrustScreenV5, PackSelectionScreen, CheckoutScreenV5. Home screen and Landing page post-purchase flows not fully tested due to payment requirement.

v5_splash_screen.details: Loads correctly with 'NIRO - Your Astrology Companion' tagline and 'Get Started' button

birth_details_screen.details: Form works correctly with 'I don't know' birth time skip feature

topic_selection_screen.details: Shows 3 topics (Love, Career, Health) with sub-topic previews

subtopic_selection_screen.details: Shows 6 sub-topics per topic with correct pricing

trust_screen.details: Shows 'Why NIRO?' content with stats (50+ experts, 50k+ users, 4.9★)

pack_selection_screen.details: Shows 3 tiers (Focussed, Supported, Comprehensive) with 'Recommended' badge on Supported

checkout_screen.details: Shows order summary with Razorpay 'Pay Now' button and 7-day refund guarantee

backend_tier_apis.details: All 54 tier endpoints (18 sub-topics × 3 tiers) return correct data

recommended_badge.details: Supported tier always has is_recommended=true in API and shows 'Recommended' badge in UI
